K-PORPHYRY.name: Porphyry-Cu-like terrane
K-PORPHYRY.expectedBand: magnetic high + geochem anomaly + proximity to structure are favourable; radiometrics uninformative
K-PORPHYRY.validationAnchor: mag/geochem/struct have positive contrast and clear studentized-C; ROC AUC well above 0.5

K-OROGENIC.name: Orogenic-Au-like terrane
K-OROGENIC.expectedBand: structure (shear-zone proximity) dominates; geochem secondary; magnetics uninformative
K-OROGENIC.validationAnchor: struct contrast > geochem contrast; mag near zero; honest per-layer ranking

K-VMS.name: VMS-like terrane
K-VMS.expectedBand: magnetic + geochem co-located; radiometrics weakly favourable; structure uninformative
K-VMS.validationAnchor: mag the strongest contrast; struct near zero

K-IOCG.name: IOCG-like terrane
K-IOCG.expectedBand: a strong magnetic signature with multi-layer support (the IOCG fingerprint)
K-IOCG.validationAnchor: mag dominant; all four layers contribute positively

D-RICH.name: Evidence-rich area
D-RICH.expectedBand: all four layers informative ⇒ a high-skill posterior
D-RICH.validationAnchor: ROC AUC high; capture@10% large; but watch the spatial-CV gap

D-SPARSE.name: Evidence-poor area
D-SPARSE.expectedBand: only a weak geochem signal ⇒ little real skill (honest low AUC)
D-SPARSE.validationAnchor: ROC AUC only modestly above 0.5; the product does NOT manufacture confidence

C-NEGATIVE.name: Negative control — uninformative layers
C-NEGATIVE.expectedBand: no layer is associated with the (randomly-placed) deposits
C-NEGATIVE.validationAnchor: all contrasts ≈ 0, |studentized-C| < 1.96, ROC AUC ≈ 0.5 — no skill from noise

C-CIVIOLATE.name: CI-violation oracle — a correlated duplicate
C-CIVIOLATE.expectedBand: mag and its near-duplicate double-count the same signal ⇒ the WofE posterior is inflated
C-CIVIOLATE.validationAnchor: the omnibus test fails (T > N(D), CI ratio < 1, z > 0); logistic regression does not over-estimate

C-RECOVER.name: Positive control — planted weight recovery
C-RECOVER.expectedBand: well-separated planted weights mag > geochem > struct
C-RECOVER.validationAnchor: WofE recovers the planted ORDERING: contrast(mag) > contrast(geochem) > contrast(struct) > ~contrast(noise)

C-SATURATE.name: Analytic limit — a near-perfect single layer
C-SATURATE.expectedBand: a single dominant layer drives a near-saturated posterior
C-SATURATE.validationAnchor: high W⁺ + posterior near 1 inside the pattern, no numerical blow-up (Haldane guard); AUC high
